sourceCitation: Rawat A et al. Development of machine learning models to identify potentially active compounds against tuberculosis. Sci Rep / Springer Open Access 2024; plus Memon 2025 TB management review (TB.pdf).

methodology.positiveClass: TB-related text chunks from TB2.pdf + TB.pdf
methodology.evaluationMetric: Stratified k-fold ROC-AUC (TB2 paper uses 10-fold CV + AUC)

disclaimer: Educational text classifier — not for clinical diagnosis.
